remaining_spec_items: Sprint 1: Core Layout & Shared Components (App.tsx, Sidebar, DataTable, Card, KpiCard, CollapsibleSection, ThreeLevelDrillDown, DrillDownChart, ScenarioProductBarChart, ChartTooltip, Toast, ErrorBoundary, ErrorDisplay, ConfirmDialog, StatusBadge, LockedBanner, HelpTooltip, HelpPanel, main.tsx)
Sprint 2: Workflow Pages Part 1 (CreateProject, DataProcessing, DataControl, SatelliteModel, ModelExecution, StressTesting, Overlays, SignOff)
Sprint 3: Workflow Pages Part 2 + Admin (ModelRegistry, Backtesting, MarkovChains, HazardModels, AdvancedFeatures, Attribution, Admin, GLJournals, RegulatoryReports, ApprovalWorkflow)
Sprint 4: Data Mapping Module (index, SourceBrowser, ColumnMapper, ValidationStep, ApplyStep, StatusCards, types, DataMapping)

Sprint 5: Admin Sub-pages + Stress Testing Tabs (AdminAppSettings, AdminDataMappings, AdminModelConfig, AdminSystemConfig, AdminThemeConfig, AdminJobsConfig, stress-testing/index, SensitivityTab, MonteCarloTab, ConcentrationTab, MigrationTab, VintageTab, CapitalImpact)

Sprint 6: Remaining Components + SetupWizard (SetupWizard, SimulationPanel, SimulationResults, SimulationProgress, ApprovalForm, Stepper, PageHeader, PageLoader, EmptyState, ScenarioChecklist, StepDescription, NotebookLink, JobRunLink)
last_action: Sprint 1 iteration 5 complete: Fixed test infrastructure — added app/pytest.ini + app/conftest.py so tests are discoverable from app/ directory (was causing '0 tests collected'). Fixed 2 pre-existing path bugs in test_installation_sprint7.py. All tests pass: 1303 pytest (from both root and app/), 265 theme audit, 103 vitest. Ready for Visual QA.
